goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'modern european' food and should be in the 'centre'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '18:45' on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should 'arrive by 17:30'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve modern european food and should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 18:45 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to london liverpool street
The train should leave on wednesday and should arrive by 17:30
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
